title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies:
Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barbeque Nation Digital Technologies!
